verses.text: Pasian aw, ka dikna hong langsak in la, migilote tawh ka thu-ah kei hong pan'pih in. Mi khemte leh thutanglote kiang panin kei hong honkhia in
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong belh Pasian na hi hi. Bang hangin kei hong nilkhia na hi hiam? Galte' sukcip manin bang hangin kapin kidikdik ka hi hiam
Na khuavak leh na thuman hong sawlkhia in la, na mual siangtho, na omna-ah kei hong paipih sakin, hong khasak in
Tua ciangin na biakna tau-ah ahi a, ka lung a hong damsak Pasian kiangah ahi zongin ka pai ding a, laia khausai lasakna tawh nang ka hong phat ding hi, aw Pasian, ka Pasian aw
Bang hangin khakunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi.
